name: deepseek-forge
description: Orchestrates Codex planning with DeepSeek implementation. Codex plans the work, DeepSeek generates unified diff patches, Codex reviews and applies them safely.

interface.shortDescription: Codex plans, DeepSeek codes, you review — safe patch generation plus dry-run PR branch surgery.
interface.longDescription: DeepSeek Forge is a disciplined pipeline for reviewed code patches and PR branch topology repair. Codex acts as the architect and gatekeeper: it plans the work, collects context, validates patches, applies changes, runs checks, and decides whether to commit. DeepSeek is a sandboxed patch generator that receives structured prompts and returns only unified diffs. For PR topology tasks, local scripts collect lightweight GitHub metadata and generate dry-run branch surgery plans with force-with-lease commands, verification steps, and rollback notes. Every output passes through safety validation before touching the working tree.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the deepseek-forge skill to orchestrate Codex planning with DeepSeek code generation or PR branch topology repair. Codex plans the work, DeepSeek generates unified diff patches when needed, and Codex reviews and applies changes safely.
